overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk. The scene transitions from an open urban street with glowing red digital billboards, through a covered highway underpass with artificial lighting, and out into an open highway with views of distant mountains and the Night City skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside elevated highway approach with digital billboards

events.description: futuristic sports car with headlights on drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a concrete retaining wall with illuminated red billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: steep angled concrete wall with large digital billboards mounted on its surface
illuminated red advertisement screens displaying graphics on the retaining wall
elevated multi-lane highway bridge crossing perpendicular over the road ahead
tall modern street lamp with bright white LED illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic urban sidewalk at dusk, with the camera walking forward alongside a concrete retaining wall covered in glowing red digital billboards. A few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and vehicles occasionally pass on the multi-lane road to the left. The highway overpass looms ahead as the camera approaches it.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath highway overpass with concrete support columns

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the highway overpass, sky becomes obscured
ambient light drops significantly as camera moves deeper under the overpass into shadow

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass beneath the highway, with concrete walls on both sides

entered.detail: massive concrete pillar supporting the weight of the highway above

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered underpass beneath the highway, where natural light is replaced by artificial street lighting. The space is enclosed by concrete walls and support columns, with no pedestrians visible. The retaining wall continues on the right, though the red billboards are now behind and out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway approach with distant mountain backdrop and city skyline

events.description: exiting the underpass into open space with expansive view of distant mountains and city
large dark truck drives past on the road heading in the same direction as the camera

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and continuing along the sidewalk with an open view of the cityscape ahead

entered.detail: mountain range silhouetted against the dusk sky on the horizon
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings of Night City visible in the distance
massive illuminated screen displaying a character's face with text advertisement

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the underpass into an open highway area, revealing a sweeping view of the distant city skyline and mountains against the dusk sky. A large digital billboard appears on the left side of the road. The concrete retaining wall continues alongside but recedes into the distance as the road stretches forward toward the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a vibrant urban sidewalk into a sheltered underpass and finally out toward a vast city vista. It begins by walking along a concrete retaining wall adorned with glowing red digital billboards, passing pedestrians and traffic under the dim light of dusk. As the camera approaches the looming highway overpass, the scene shifts into a covered underpass where the red glow fades and natural light is replaced by artificial street lighting among concrete support columns. The camera then emerges from the enclosure into an open highway area, where the view expands to reveal a sweeping skyline and distant mountains against the evening sky. Finally, the road stretches forward toward the city as a large digital billboard appears on the left and the retaining wall recedes into the distance.
